name: Biometric Attendance & Payroll Analytics
description: Enterprise workforce analytics platform for biometric attendance processing, payroll support, attendance reconciliation, exception management, overtime analysis, and operational reporting. Features configurable attendance rules, consolidated multi-month reporting, automated validation workflows, dashboard analytics, PDF/Excel/CSV exports, and audit-ready attendance intelligence. Developed as an applied workforce analytics and process-automation solution with a strong focus on accuracy, transparency, and operational decision support.
